== Notes for [[Item:Q106500|Q106500]] ==

From ''Banu Bahra/ Banu Quza'aa'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Miqdad_ibn_Aswad

Source 2: http://www.al-islam.org/hayat-al-qulub-vol2-allamah-muhammad-baqir-al-majlisi/63.htm

Source 3: http://www.al-islam.org/gallery/kids/Books/companion6/

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015228217232

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
